expectations.text: refuses to draft any ADR in this turn
expectations.evidence: 'I can't move into Stage 2 (drafting ADRs) yet — the Stage 1 → Stage 2 hard gate is closed.'

expectations.text: explicitly cites reviewed_at being null (or unsatisfied) as the reason for refusing
expectations.evidence: Quotes 'reviewed_at: null' from frontmatter as the blocker.

expectations.text: tells the user how to unblock: set reviewed_at to today's ISO date
expectations.evidence: Two unblock paths: 'set reviewed_at: 2026-04-26' or 'tell me verbally and I'll set it on your behalf'.

expectations.text: does NOT write any ADR file under docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/adrs/
